summary: Group Chat Backend APIs and Frontend UI testing completed. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Chat page with Chats/Groups tabs working correctly. Create Group dialog functional.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 'closed before established' error. Non-blocking for app functionality.

integration_issues.issue: No /messages route defined in App.js - app uses /chat route for messages/groups. This is working as designed.

issues: Missing DialogContent Description/aria-describedby warning in console - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Group Chat API: POST /api/groups - Create group returns 200
Group Chat API: POST /api/groups - Empty name returns 400
Group Chat API: POST /api/groups - No participants returns 400
Group Chat API: POST /api/groups - Invalid token returns 401
Group Chat API: GET /api/groups - List groups returns 200
Group Chat API: GET /api/groups - Member can see groups
Group Chat API: GET /api/groups - Invalid token returns 401

Group Chat API: GET /api/groups/{id} - Member can get details
Group Chat API: GET /api/groups/{id} - Non-existent returns 404
Group Chat API: PUT /api/groups/{id} - Admin can update
Group Chat API: PUT /api/groups/{id} - Non-admin returns 403
Group Chat API: POST /api/groups/{id}/admins/{user} - Make admin works
Group Chat API: New admin can update group
Group Chat API: DELETE /api/groups/{id}/admins/{user} - Remove admin works
Group Chat API: Removed admin cannot update (403)
Group Chat API: POST /api/groups/{id}/members - Add member works

Group Chat API: DELETE /api/groups/{id} - Creator can delete
Group Chat API: Deleted group returns 404

Group Chat API: Add non-existent user handled gracefully

Frontend: Chats tab present and working
Frontend: Groups tab present and working (shows count)
Frontend: Create Group button in header working

Frontend: Search users input present (data-testid)
Frontend: Create Group button in dialog present (data-testid)
Frontend: New Chat button working
Frontend: Tab switching works between Chats/Groups
critical_code_review_comments: Group Chat APIs fully functional with proper admin/creator role management
All API endpoints have proper authentication and authorization checks
Frontend Group Chat UI components integrated correctly with ConversationList
Play Store URL placeholder configured in PlayStoreBanner.jsx and AppDownloadSection.jsx
seed_data_creation: Created test groups during testing, cleaned up after tests. Existing group 'FaceConnect Sq...' visible in UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Chat feature fully tested. Backend APIs at /api/groups/* all working with proper CRUD, member management, and admin roles. Frontend Chat page at /chat route has working Chats/Groups tabs. CreateGroupDialog has proper data-testid attributes. Play Store URL placeholder is set to 'https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.faceconnect.app' in both PlayStoreBanner.jsx and AppDownloadSection.jsx.
